visual_description:
A medium close-up shot focuses on a man in a dimly lit room, likely a control center. He is dressed in a dark suit, a white collared shirt, and a dark tie. He wears large, over-the-ear headphones and holds a black phone receiver to his ear, his expression one of intense concentration. In the background, another person in a blue uniform with the letters "OCTP" on the back is visible, along with several computer monitors displaying blue-toned data. The on-screen text "风行网" appears in the upper left corner. The audio begins with a man speaking in a calm, focused, and professional tone, as if giving a report or receiving an update. He states, "靠近沙滩，应该开始验货了" (Getting close to the beach, they should start inspecting the goods now). His voice is steady and clear, suggesting he is in a position of authority and is monitoring a situation closely.

Immediately following his words, a tense and dramatic instrumental score begins. The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of the man's face. He lowers the phone, his brow furrowed in thought. The headphones are still on his ears. The "风行网" text remains on screen. The music
